<div align="center">

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfstherun/attract.jpg" width="760" alt="Need for Speed: The Run - FusionFix">

**Need for Speed: The Run Fusion Fix** improves the windowed mode, adds a free-look camera, includes unlock options and quality-of-life improvements.

[Website](https://thirteenag.github.io/wfp#nfstherun) · [Source Code](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/source/NFSTheRun.FusionFix/dllmain.cpp) · [Default INI](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/data/NFSTheRun.FusionFix/plugins/NFSTheRun.FusionFix.ini)

</div>

---

## New Options

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfstherun/introskip.jpg" width="360" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 0 24px;" alt="Gameplay">

- **Skip Intro** - enables faster loading by bypassing startup FMVs and login prompts
- **Improved Windowed Mode** - makes windowed mode borderless and resizes the window to match the selected resolution
- **Console Gamma** - a custom gamma curve that creates a more contrasted image with deeper colors, similar to how some games looked on the Xbox 360
<br clear="both">

---

## Camera

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfstherun/camera.gif" width="400" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 16px 24px;" alt="Mouse look in-game">

- **Mouse/Stick Look** - fully functional free-look with adjustable sensitivity for both mouse and right stick. Experience *Need for Speed: The Run* like never before with new camera angles. Reset timeout, return speed, and vertical axis inversion are all configurable in the `.ini` file.
- Press **LS + RS** simultaneously to toggle between the original Free Look camera and the new one.
<br clear="both">

---

## Unlocks

- **Unlock All Cars** - unlocks all vehicles in the garage
- **Unlock Challenges** - unlocks all challenge content
- **Unlock Everything** - unlocks all content in the game

---

## Installation

1. Download the `.zip` from this release.
2. Extract the contents directly into the game folder - the same folder as `Need For Speed The Run.exe`.
3. Optionally edit `NFSTheRun.FusionFix.ini` to configure the available options.
4. Launch the game.

---
